files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-16126-setting-istio-sidecar-proxy-resource-request-limit",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit",
+    "description": "Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\nHello :)\n\n**Describe the feature request**\n\nIs there an option to set istio proxy sidecar request/limits per application (Pod)? For some of our applications we would like to use Guaranteed QoS"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit",
+        "description": "When a limitrange is active, not setting the limits will result\nin an error. This patch will allow setting limits for the sidecar\nand when not set, use the requests value.\n\nFor fixing https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/16126\n```yaml\ncontainers:\n  - name: istio-proxy\n…\n    resources:\n      limits:\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU`) -]]\n        cpu: \"[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU` ]]\"\n        [[ else -]]\n        cpu: 200m\n        [[ end ]]\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory`) -]]\n        memory: \"[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory` ]]\"\n        [[ else -]]\n        memory: 256Mi\n        [[ end ]]\n      requests:\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.is\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Setting istio sidecar proxy resource request/limit\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When a limitrange is active, not setting the limits will result\nin an error. This patch will allow setting limits for the sidecar\nand when not set, use the requests value.\n\nFor fixing https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/16126",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "containers:\n  - name: istio-proxy\n…\n    resources:\n      limits:\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU`) -]]\n        cpu: \"[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU` ]]\"\n        [[ else -]]\n        cpu: 200m\n        [[ end ]]\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory`) -]]\n        memory: \"[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory` ]]\"\n        [[ else -]]\n        memory: 256Mi\n        [[ end ]]\n      requests:\n        [[ if (isset .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsCPU`) -]]\n        cpu: \"[[ index .ObjectMeta.Annotations `sidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsCPU` ]]\"\n        [[ else -]]\n        cpu: 100m\n        [[ end ]]\n        [[ if (isset .Objec",
+        "sidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsCPU: \"200m\"\nsidecar.istio.io/proxyRequestsMemory: \"512Mi\"\nsidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsCPU: \"300m\"\nsidecar.istio.io/proxyLimitsMemory: \"1Gi\"",
+        "--set global.proxy.resources.limits.memory=\"300Mi\"\n--set global.proxy.resources.limits.cpu=\"500m\" \\"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    },
